title: cullen parvum
intro: Cullen parvum, also known as Petty Mullein, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the evening primrose family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Cullen parvum include relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Cullen parvum typically involve infusions or tinctures made from the leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, salves, or topical creams for various health applications.
